heroSubtitle: Connect with neighbors, find local resources, and stay informed. Whether you live here or are visiting, we're glad you're here.
homeContent:
Use the navigation above to explore this portal. Administrators can customize pages, links, and announcements from the admin console.

Tip: Sign in with the community password to see additional links for neighbors and partners.

pages.title: About
pages.content: This community portal provides a central place for announcements, documents, and links your organization maintains. Replace this text from the admin interface.

pages.title: Services
pages.content: List permits, utilities, parking, departments, or partner services here. Administrators can edit this page and add outbound links as needed.

pages.title: Calendar
pages.content: Post upcoming meetings, events, and deadlines. Content is edited through the admin portal.

pages.title: Member updates
pages.content: This section is visible after signing in with the shared community password. Use it for announcements, draft policies, or partner-only links your organization agrees to share.

pages.title: Neighborhood resources
pages.content: Authenticated members can list local groups, meeting notes, or volunteer opportunities here. Content is maintained by portal administrators.
